spell.name: Armory of Light
spell.description:
While holding a shield, you have a $s2% chance to block incoming spells, reducing their damage by $s3%.
Without a shield, you have a $s4% chance to parry incoming melee attacks, reducing their damage by $s5%.

spell.name: Rising Sunlight
